python-dotenv==1.0.1
watchfiles==0.24.0
httpx==0.28.1
# Web UI (FastAPI + WebSocket + multipart uploads).
fastapi==0.115.5
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.1
python-multipart==0.0.17
# Face ID / passkey support on the web UI. Pure-Python WebAuthn ceremony
# validator; no external service. Credentials persist to <projects_root>/
# .crc-passkeys.json (gitignored, single-user).
webauthn==2.5.0
# Web Push: send "Claude finished" notifications to subscribed phones
# even when the PWA is closed. Uses VAPID auth (keys auto-generated on
# first run and stored in <projects_root>/.crc-push.json). No third-party
# push service — the bridge POSTs directly to whatever push endpoint the
# browser handed us at subscribe time.
pywebpush==2.3.0
# Local Whisper for the mic button. Audio bytes from MediaRecorder are
# decoded + transcribed entirely in memory (PyAV → ctranslate2) so the
# user's voice never touches disk. Model auto-downloads to
# ~/.cache/huggingface on first use. See bridge/web/transcribe.py for
# the env-var knobs (WHISPER_MODEL, WHISPER_DEVICE, WHISPER_COMPUTE_TYPE).
faster-whisper>=1.1.0
# Image shrink on upload. Anthropic's vision API rejects messages
# containing any image whose longest edge exceeds 2000 px (the limit
# triggers a "Start a new session with fewer images" error and wedges
# the conversation). We pre-shrink to a 1568 px max-edge (Anthropic's
# recommended cost-optimal size) using Pillow's LANCZOS resampling
# before the file ever lands on disk. See _maybe_shrink_image() in
# bridge/web/server.py.
Pillow>=10.3.0
